description: NFC and NFD Unicode inputs of the same logical string canonicalize to byte-identical output, proving JCS RFC 8785 normalization rules per ADR-0004.
citation: adrs/0004-json-canonicalization.md §Decision (Unicode NFC normalization per JCS RFC 8785)
note: Both NFC ('café' as U+00E9) and NFD ('cafe' + combining acute U+0301) MUST canonicalize to the same NFC byte sequence.
